subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! A letter hath been received from Amín, wherein he extolleth thee to the utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای از جانب امین رسید نهایت ستایش از شما نموده که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
